name: space_operations_mutual_aid_request_southport_ind_col
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Space Operations, the situation tagged internally around space operations mutual aid request southport ind col has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Hector Silva
agents.identity: I am Hector Silva, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Space Operations. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Dubois
agents.identity: I am Amina Dubois, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Space Operations. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on collective.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on collective for immediate traction on individual.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Hector Silva must choose under individual versus collective. What does Hector Silva do?
